default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Handover of NoBoringDesign client account from Andrej to Jenn and Deya](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [NoBoringDesign is a relatively new, easy-to-manage client (since Jan/Feb) focused on web design and branding](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Current deliverables: 10 blog articles per week, no refreshes yet](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [Client is hands-off, trusting GrowthX's expertise; minimal feedback/approval process](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [Webflow CMS used; some recent improvements to workflow and interlinking](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)

## Topics

### Client Overview and Workflow

  - [Design agency specializing in web design, branding](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [45 topics covered so far, more being added](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Client provides visuals, GrowthX handles content creation](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Publishing done directly by GrowthX team without client approval](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Recent feedback on brand tone to be addressed](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)

### Content Strategy and Performance

  - [Focus on building blog from scratch, aware of long-term growth](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Using Google Search Console for basic metrics tracking](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
  - [Performance tab created in Notion for client access](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [Indexing issues resolved, all published content now indexed](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)

### Technical Setup and Tools

  - [Webflow CMS used for website](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Shared Google Drive folder for image assets](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Interlinking now functional, using Air ops tool](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
  - [Metadata optimization needed for low CTR articles](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)

### Handover Process

  - [Andrej to include Jenn and Deya in next week's client sync (Wednesdays, 2pm EST)](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [Comprehensive documentation, videos, and Loom walkthroughs to be provided](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Additional call if needed after reviewing materials](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andrej to record and send over documentation, videos, and Loom walkthroughs](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [Jenn and Deya to review materials and prepare questions](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Team to join next week's client sync for introduction](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Consider implementing a staggered publishing schedule (e.g., Wed/Thurs/Fri) instead of bulk uploads](https://fathom.video/share/3g-y-E3xhYfm9J2uFREx6pHFyyozFtzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
